data.body: CHECKPOINT: Implementation complete. _check_rate_limit_error() added to agent-batch-lifecycle.sh with sentinel-based throttle override in cmd_pre_check(). All 15 error-reactive tests GREEN. All 24 portability tests GREEN. Changes: (1) _RL_SENTINEL variable captures RATE_LIMIT_SENTINEL env var for bash source-prefix compatibility, (2) _check_rate_limit_error() greps rate.limit|usage.limit|quota.exceeded (case-insensitive), writes sentinel with unix timestamp, (3) cmd_pre_check() reads sentinel — fresh (<5min) forces MAX_AGENTS:1, expired (>5min) removes sentinel, (4) cmd_check_error subcommand for orchestrator convenience. Mtime fallback for sentinel files without embedded timestamp.
